hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|css|json|md)$'; then pnpm exec prettier --write --log-level=warn $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>/dev/null || true; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" | grep -qE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx)$'; then pnpm exec eslint --fix --no-error-on-unmatched-pattern $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>/dev/null || true; fi

case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS" in *vite.config.ts*|*tsconfig*.json|*package.json|*pnpm-lock.yaml*) echo 'BLOCK: file di configurazione critico. Chiedere conferma esplicita prima di modificarlo.' >&2; exit 1;; esac; exit 0
